headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://res.cloudinary.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.railway.app https://*.up.railway.app; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
